'''Seteem Ervic''' was a farmer who lived on [[Saffalore]].

==Biography==
After inheriting his family's business, Seteem spent years working to make it successful. He eventually achieved his goal, though it cost him, among other things, his first wife and most of his hair. He hoped his daughter would one day take over and expand the business worldwide.

One day, while transporting [[grain cake]]s to the city of [[Lurark]], he came upon a [[Shalla Nelprin|woman]] lying in the road. After getting out to check on her, she drew a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and he turned to find the members of [[Wraith Squadron]] gathered around his [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]], which he promptly surrendered.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
